## Indian Agate Meaning

Indian Agate meaning is defined by the fact that it releases all the stress by helping you deal with emotions. Also known as the stone of eternity, Indian Agate helps release the fear of age. It provides comfort and confidence for growing old with all the wisdom, charm and love for life. This crystal sparks positive thoughts and helps you change the outlook of the future. It is said to bring good luck to its owner. 

This unique crystal provides self-confidence and a belief in how beautiful your soul is. Indian Agate gives a calming effect and possesses multiple healing properties which makes it a powerful neutralizer by negating unwanted energy. Summarising Indian Agate meaning as follows

• Stone of Eternity
• Enhances physical strength
• Anti-stress
• Releases old unwanted emotions
• Promotes creativity
• Gives inner strength and willpower
• Neutralizer stone

Image by Amazon.in

## What is Indian Agate

Indian Agate is a crystal from the Agate family. It is made of chalcedony and quartz which are the primary components. It is made of silicon dioxide with a hardness of 6.7-7 on Moh’s hardness scale.

These are mostly found in the volcanic regions as they are formed within volcanos and metamorphic rocks. Minerals of the Agate family in general have the tendency to be formed within pre-existing rocks or on them.

## Colour of Indian Agate

Indian Agate can be found in many colours like Blue, yellow and dark red with a patchwork of multiple hues but the primary colour remains green for any of these crystals. It is green for a good reason spiritually. 

Minerals that are green have a strong connection to mother earth. It is believed to bring peace and calmness to the space it is situated in. These are said to be the neutralizers that can handle any amount of negative energies and prevent them from affecting you.

## Origin of Indian Agate

As the name suggests, Indian Agate was found in deep deposits in India. It is also found in other locations like Botswana, Uruguay, Quebec and Madagascar. 

It is said that, in ancient times, Indian Agate was worn by almost all poor people. They would feel a different vibration and a wonderful aura around them. These people believed that wearing this crystal would someday turn them into kings. Later it was also worn as a piece of fashion jewellery by many hippies throughout the entire period of the 1960s.

These gemstones flow through the river and streams after getting detached from their natural environment. They hit different places while flowing through rivers and form their own shape. The sunlight, moonlight and water pressure, all contribute to the energy that Indian Agate comes out with. 

The crystal changes its colours during this period and gains all the healing powers from different sources. It is a symbol of strength, courage, wealth and beautiful life.

## Indian Agate Meaning & Chakra Connection

Indian Agate is connected to the heart chakra and sacral chakra. Unblocking and cleansing your chakras brings about many health benefits and takes care of your overall well-being.

## Heart Chakra and Indian Agate

The heart Chakra is in the fourth and middle of all chakras. It is the centre of love, compassion and fearlessness. When Indian Agate aligns with the heart chakra you experience balance in your emotions and a sense of trust with yourself and the people closest to you. It will allow you to open yourself to various experiences of life, deal with challenges and flow through tough times without difficulties. 

The heart chakra is one of the most powerful chakras and it is important to keep it unblocked and aligned to your body. This is achievable by using India Agate regularly. 

## Sacral Chakra and Indian Agate

Sacral Chakra, also called the second chakra, resides two inches below the belly button and influences the emotions of our body, sensuality and creativity. When Indian Agate aligns the sacral chakra of the body, you will experience a feeling of warmth and generosity. Any sort of emotional imbalance, stress or anxiousness will be gradually healed. 

This increases intuition, sexuality and creativity. The use of Indian Agate will keep the sacral chakra unblocked and this will healthy emotions and awaken the inner child in you. You experience pleasure in giving and receiving. It is believed that all the stress of wounded emotions, nightmares and issues with sexual intimacy will begin to heal gradually.

## Indian Agate healing properties

As Indian Agate belongs to the Agate family, this crystal possesses multiple healing properties and benefits to one’s well-being. 

## Physical healing properties of Indian Agate

Indian Agate aids the overall metabolism of the human body. It enhances the blood flow in the body and improves the digestive system. A healthy blood flow ensures good health of brain functioning and heart health. 

It helps in faster healing in case of a muscle tear or tissue repair. When the metabolism is active, it helps in digesting food faster and all the nutrients get absorbed quickly. This helps prepare the body to fight all kinds of infections and enhances the overall immune system of the body. It aids in skin-related disorders like skin infections etc.

Indian Agate is considered helpful for the hollow organs like stomach, intestine and uterus.

## Metaphysical healing properties of Indian Agate

Indian Agate is considered a powerful crystal for the healing properties it possesses. It is a stone that becomes a key to your self-discovery. Indian Agate is deeply associated with Indian culture and is said to be the stone of the rishis, sages and sadhus of ancient India. These are prayer bead gemstones used by rishis and many other people while doing their prayers. Even to this date, the rishis in India use this crystal for its healing properties. 

Indian Agate is a protective stone that keeps you protected from evil and negative energies. There is a sense of security that one feels with this crystal around by harmonising the mind and body. Meditating with Indian Agate will open up the heart chakra and the solar plexus chakra. This starts giving inner peace, clarity and self-acceptance which helps in calming the soul and body.

Indian Agate balances the Yin/Yang. Yin/Yang is a philosophy from olden times around the energies of the universe. What this philosophy says is, that if you want a happy, joyful and safe life, you need to balance both sides of the coin. When there is balance, you feel happy and protected and things happen in your life just the way they are supposed to. 

Everything starts to fall in place. The bright and the dark side have to be in balance to attain this. Hence, Indian Agate being the balancer for Yin/Yang becomes a powerful stone that can stabilise your life.

## Emotional healing properties of Indian Agate

Indian Agate is a protective, comforting and nurturing crystal which makes it capable of dealing with emotional imbalances and disturbances. These are balancing crystals that begin their work from within the body and start healing inside first. 

Your inner self begins to get strengthened which gives you clarity and enhances self-belief. You start to trust yourself more, believing your gut and your instincts more. As a result, your self-confidence builds up and your creative side awakens. You will remain protected from unwanted and negative thoughts.

## How to use Indian Agate

In India, when Indian Agate flows through the rivers, it gathers all kinds of energies from the gushing water and the moon. The journey of this crystal has shaped it for the properties that it has. Similarly, when you use this crystal, you will experience when you flow through tough terrains of your life, the journey only makes you stronger and wiser. 

You become stronger with each experience. Just like the edges of the stone smoothens, you will also shape your life and make it just the way you wished for. You will begin to accept yourself the way you are and start loving yourself. 

## Mediating with Indian Agate

Meditating with Indian Agate can be very powerful. Sages and Sadhus use beads made of Indian Agate to mediate. Chanting the mantra while counting the beads in your hand can enhance your mediating experience. You may hold the chanting mala in your hands. As you chant your mantra or when you meditate without any chants, move the beads using your thumb one at a time. keep doing that for as long as you meditate. You will experience a fearless and a courageous soul within you.

## Indian Agate as Jewellery

Indian Agate can be worn as jewellery. Using this crystal as a bracelet, necklace, ring or earrings are a few of the best ways to keep this crystal closer to yourself. This way you can benefit from the healing properties of Indian Agate. 

Also known as the stone of sages, these are used as ‘malas’. Malas also means necklace. These Buddhist prayer beads are used by sages and sadhus during their prayers. They hold it in their hands and use it for keeping a count of their chanting and mantras as they roll each bead. 

There are 108 beads in the mala and all these beads signify the 108 stages of a human soul. In India, even the common people who are deeply into prayers use these beads on a daily basis to chant prayers and OM.

These have been a part of the tradition and have been used by sages for ages now. That’s how ancient and powerful this crystal is.

## Indian Agate at work or travel

Indian Agate can be carried along with you wherever you go. The crystal being at your arm’s reach helps in accessing it easily and using it whenever you need it. You can keep it in your wallet or purse or even pocket. Whenever you feel the need to calm yourself or bring positivity around you, just take the crystal in your hands and close your eyes. 

You may bring all your energy to the centre, take a deep breath in and release it from your mouth. You will feel the negativity and stress getting released from your body. 

Keeping this stone handy will enable you to practise this anywhere. All you need is a peaceful corner even if it’s your car or a nearby garden.

## How to cleanse Indian Agate

## Cleansing Indian Agate using water

Indian agate is a very hard and strong crystal. It can easily be used in water for the purpose of cleansing and recharging. 

You can wash the crystal in running water and wipe it off with soft cotton. It can also be soaked in water and later dried off. A soft soap water can also be used for this purpose. 

## Cleansing Indian Agate using Sage

Sage smoke can also be used to cleanse Indian Agate. Place the crystal on a flat surface. Light the sage and guide the smoke towards the crystal. While doing this, mediate and use your energy and vibrations to recharge the crystal. After the cleansing is done, place the crystal in your hands and chant your mantras to align it with your vibrations. 

You are now all set to use your crystal again.

## Green Goldstone Meaning

Green Goldstone meaning is derived from its ability to heal emotions and provide courage to those who are trying to move on to new beginnings. Five points to describe Green Goldstone meaning are as follows

• Your protection cloak from negative energies
• Self-Love enabler
• Balances emotions and mind
• Easy sail through in challenging situations
• Courage and empowerment to make tough decisions

Green Goldstone keeps the mind calm and reflects the negative energies away from you. It is called the calming crystal and is best for emotional healing. Green Goldstone emits positive energies and clears your aura. Also known as the ‘stone of life‘ this crystal aids in achieving your goal, making you courageous and face all your fears. Apart from emotional healing, this crystal is known for its metaphysical healing properties also.

Green Goldstone connects with the heart chakra of your body. When the heart chakra is aligned, your body begins to balance emotions and heart. There is an increase in the feeling of self-confidence, abundance and joy. 

Green Goldstone uplifts the spirit and acts as an energy generator which helps the wearer stay motivated to achieve their goal.  

Before getting into details Green Goldstone here is a quick snapshot of this crystal & its properties

Origin Man-Made, in VeniceZodiacSagittarius & TaurusColorBottle Green & Dark Green – Contains tiny triangular particles of copperHardness5.5 – 6 on Moh’s hardness scaleTransperencyOpaqueChakraHeartChemical CompositionSilica Glass with Copper particlesGlance of healing properties of Green Goldstone

Emotional Healing PropertiesImproves Focus, Balances emotions, aids decision makingSpiritual Healing PropertiesProtection cloak from negative energy, enables psychic abilities, strengthens communication Physical Healing PropertiesRelief from joint pains, arthritis, migraine & headaches

## About Green Goldstone & Origin

In the seventeenth century, the Miotti family from Venice invented this crystal. Green Goldstone is a dark green stone with a beautiful glitter and a space-like depth to its colouring. This is a man-made crystal and isn’t found naturally unlike the other crystals. It is made by infusing mineral copper particles into the glass. This added chromium results in the sparkles that the stone has.

Does Green Goldstone possess healing properties? Yes, It does. In Spite of the crystal being man-made, Green Goldstone possesses multiple healing properties due to the crystal glass being made of quartz sand (Silica). More on the healing properties in upcoming sections.

This crystal is found in other colours as well like brown, purple, blue, orange, white and yellow.

You will get to see the true beauty of this crystal by placing it under the microscope. You will see little copper particles in the shape of a triangle, shining and reflecting light from below the surface of the crystal. You should definitely try this if you have a microscope handy! The view is breathtaking! 

Blue Goldstone. Image by Wikimdeia.com

## Common properties of Green Goldstone

• Helps in achieving goals
• Makes you courageous & self-confident
• Ignites adventurous nature
• Enhances sense of creativity & Innovation
• Aids long distance healing
• Invites abundance & prosperity
• Balances and restores positive energy
• Promotes psychic abilities
• Provides acceleration and protection to spiritual journey
• Aids with healing of joint pain, bone disorders & headache

## Green Goldstone Meaning and its Chakra connection

Green Goldstone aligns with the fourth chakra of the chakra family – the heart chakra. This chakra is located at the centre of the spine near the heart. It acts as a bridge between the lower and upper chakras of the body. This is one of the most powerful chakras and acts as a reservoir of energy, love and compassion. 

The meaning of Green Goldstone is derived from its ability to balance emotions and provide mental strength as well. When Green Goldstone connects with the chakra to align it with your body, you will feel strengthened from within. The surroundings appear loving and joyous. You will experience a stronger level of connectedness with yourself. 

You will be able to experience the real beauty of life. You will have the strength to overcome the challenges that come your way and smoothly sail through them. Green Goldstone together with heart chakra will help you develop a bond with yourself that will be trustworthy, loving, grounded, free of fear and very deep. 

Green goldstone combined with the aligned heart chakra can become a powerhouse that will keep emitting all the positive vibrations that will make you a confident and self-loving person.

With these alignments, Green Goldstone becomes one of those crystals that have many healing properties. Read the next section to know about the healing properties of Green Goldstone.

## Green Goldstone healing properties

Like many other gemstones, Green Goldstone also possesses healing powers. People often use this crystal in different ways for maximum benefits. Green Goldstone is believed to have emotional, spiritual and physical healing properties. Read on to know more about each of them.

## Physical healing properties of Green Goldstone

Green Goldstone is known to have many physical healing properties. The presence of copper in Green Goldstone makes it a perfect gemstone to soothe issues related to circulatory system disorder and arthritis. It provides aid with issues like joint pain, bone disorders and inflammation. People have experienced help with migraine, headaches and nervous-related ailments.

Keeping Green Goldstone around may soothe people with these types of ailments

## Spiritual healing properties of Green Goldstone

Green Goldstone acts as a protection cloak while keeping the negative energies away. 
It is believed to enhance the psychic abilities of the wearer. Communication is also strengthened. One experiences improvement in their focus with a feeling of abundance and prosperity. 

Unwanted thoughts and feelings that might be harming your body are also removed. One might begin to understand their body and soul in more depth. This will help in identifying which feelings and thoughts are good for your well-being and which are those that you need to get rid of.

## Emotional healing properties of Green Goldstone

Green Goldstone is said to help people achieve their goals. By making one’s mind calm and balancing emotions it acts as a stabiliser for inner feelings. 

It is known for deflecting unwanted energies away from the crystal owner. Because of this property, people also use this stone as a protective store.

By bringing balance to emotions, Green Goldstone also brings a sense of self-confidence to people. The ability to regain confidence and bring clarity in mind to take the right decision is observed in the wearer of this crystal. 

## How to use Green Goldstone

There are specific ways in which Green Goldstone can be used to benefit from its properties. Read on to learn more about it

## Green Goldstone for Meditation

Meditation as a practice itself is very beneficial. Doing it regularly can bring about massive changes to your life. Meditation combined with Green Goldstone will enhance the overall well-being and health of the body. 

It will calm your mind and make the surroundings peaceful. You will experience improvement in your focus as you go along. Being able to concentrate on something while shutting down all the other noises in your head becomes easy.

If you have been practising meditation for a long time and are aware of the process, all you need to do is 

• Sit in the meditation position and hold Green Goldstone in your hands. 
• Place it on your palm and begin your meditation. 
• Feel the vibrations of the crystal while you breathe in and out.
• After the initial few minutes you may remove your focus from the stone and continue meditation
• Keep the stone in your palms until you finish your meditation

Those who are new to meditation itself and want to begin it with this crystal along side can start their journey with few simple steps

• Find a peaceful place or corner at your home
• Sit on the mat and make sure you are comfortable
• Hold the crystal in your palm & feel its presence 
• Stretch your spine tall and long
• Close your eyes and focus on each of your body parts
• Feel the sounds around you and become cognisant of your surrounding
• Focus on each breath while inhaling and exhaling
• As Green Goldstone activates heart chakra, focus on your heart while meditating. Try to release all unwanted emotions, stress and worries. 
• Be present in that moment and focus on how each part of your body is breathing and alive.
• Do this as long as you feel comfortable. If you are new to this, start with 5minutes and later extend it as per your comfort,

While meditation can be done anytime during the day, you may choose to do it early in the morning. There will be absolute silence and just the chirping of birds is what you can hear. 

A regular meditation with Green Goldstone will help make your mind calm. You will experience joy and peace overall.

## Green Goldstone as jewellery

Green Goldstone can be worn as jewellery as well. As a pendant or bracelet. People wear it as earrings and finger rings also. Helps balance your wealth requirements and connections with people around you.

## Green Goldstone while journaling

A Lot of people are into journaling these days as it helps them talk to themselves. Keeping your feelings and emotions to yourself can be harmful over time. It is important you let out all sorts of thoughts running in your mind. Be it fear, love, stress or worry. Journaling is one of the ways where people let out all their emotions without speaking to anybody else. 

To add to this wonderful process, Green Goldstone when used while journaling enhances the effect. You come out of this process with a clear mind and without any negative emotions.

Journaling along with Green Goldstone will instil courage in you and will provide the ability to think clearly even in difficult situations. 

When you write about your daily experiences or about a particular instance, make sure you pour your heart out. Express your ambitions and goals. Feel the positive energy flowing in from the crystal and let it inspire you to take on all those challenges you earlier feared.

Once you are done with your journaling, sit down close your eyes and take a deep breath and exhale with your mouth. Visualise the crystal passing on the courage and the adventurous spirit to your soul.

## Green Goldstone placement at Home & Work

Green Goldstones as such can be placed anywhere in the house or at work. You can’t go wrong with this. But as Green Goldstone is an earth crystal and is about balancing emotions, you can place this crystal at a place in the house where you would like to introduce balance and growth. At the workplace, you may place it at a corner where you are seated and you need your daily dose of motivation.

## Green Goldstone affirmations

Affirmations are believed to be a strong tool for bringing about changes in your life. It works in a way that repeating those words will bring in positive energy. All that you ask for, you also start to believe it. Once you start believing, you gain that self-confidence. Once you are self-confident, it’s half the battle won.

You can either write down the affirmations, chant them like mantras or simply repeat them in your head.

• I am emotionally balanced
• I am healed both emotionally & spiritually
• I am courageous 
• I am abundant 
• I am strong
• All i need is already within me
• Today will be a productive day 
• I face challenges of my life with confidence and positive attitude

## How to cleanse Green Goldstone

Cleansing and recharging your crystal is important. All the negative energy that it absorbs has to be removed from it. This helps in restoring its healing properties.

To cleanse a Green Goldstone you can use running water, sunlight or the moonlight. Using warm water is the easiest and simple way. You may also try smudging as a method to cleanse Green Goldstone.

## Using smudging to cleanse Green Goldstone

You can use sage or palo santo to cleanse Green Goldstone. Place the sage in a deep metal bowl. After lighting it, wait for the leaves to start burning and releasing smoke. With your hands blow the smoke towards the crystal and focus your thoughts on cleansing the crystal. This can also be a form of meditation for you. Direct your thoughts and energy to cleanse the crystal as the smoke blows through the crystal. 

Alternatively, you can also place the crystal on a table and use a feather to guide the smoke to the crystal.

## Using sunlight to cleanse Green Goldstone 

Sunlight is considered to be a good source to cleanse crystals. You can place it under the sunlight early in the morning. Make sure the sunlight is not too harsh and direct. 

Place it there for not more than an hour and remove it. 

## Using Moonlight to cleanse Green Goldstone

Moonlight is the safest option to cleanse your crystal. You can place your crystal outside at night under direct moonlight and take it back in the morning before it is exposed to sunlight. Moonlight is not too harsh and has a warm feeling to it. This will cleanse your crystal. 

## Using running water to cleanse Green Goldstone

Using water to cleanse stone is a simpler way. Water does not cause harm to Green Goldstone and hence can be placed under running water for cleansing it. 

## How to take care of and maintain Green Goldstone

Regular use of crystals can make them collect dirt on them. It is important we keep cleaning them regularly.

Use lukewarm water to clean the crystal. You can also dip it in the water. Use little detergent or soap in the water. Once washed and removed, you soft cotton cloth or a cotton ball to gently wipe the water off. 

If you want to avoid water, you can use a cotton ball to simply wipe it off. This can be done frequently. You can also use a damp cotton ball to wipe all sides of the crystal. 

If you have used a damp cotton ball, use a soft tissue paper to wipe off the water.

sodalite.water_safety_content:
Yes, Sodalite can go in water. But I do NOT recommend it since it can cause a lot of harm to the crystal.

Sodalite crystal

One of the most common questions that I have come across about this crystal is that can sodalite go in water? Why can sodalite go or not go in the water?  We shall cover answers to these questions and much more about sodalite in this blog. Read on!

If you are a gemstone or mineral enthusiast and are fond of collecting them, you must have definitely considered getting your hands on a purple sodalite or blue sodalite.

Sodalite is a tectosilicate mineral and a part of the sodalite group. It is a royal blue coloured gemstone which makes it one of the most desirable crystals.

Table of Contents

Toggle

• Can you put Sodalite in water? Guide to Sodalite and water connection
• Why should you not put Sodalite in water?
• How to cleanse and recharge Sodalite
• Cleanse Sodalite using sunlight
• Cleanse Sodalite using moonlight
• Cleanse Sodalite using Amethyst

• Can Sodalite go in Salt Water
• Can sodalite go in Moon Water
• Can sodalite go in Bath Water
• Can you drink sodalite infused water
• How to prepare sodalite elixir
• Factors to evaluate before exposing your crystal to water:
• Hardness of your crystal 
• Mineral composition of your crystal
• Colour of your crystal

## Can you put Sodalite in water? Guide to Sodalite and water connection

Sodalite has cracks in it which may not be visible to naked eyes. When it comes in contact with water, the cracks widen.

Since sodalite ranges between 5.5 to 6 on the Moh’s hardness scale, it is slightly on the harder side but is still fragile when dealing with water. It is neither a hard mineral nor a soft one thus putting it in the category of minerals that should not be brought in contact with water often. 

As a rule, anything below 7 on the hardness scale should not be put in water. Hence, it is recommended to not put sodalite in water 

Sodalite is one of those minerals that does not get affected by water immediately. However, soaking sodalite in water for a longer duration can impact the appearance of the mineral.

If you rinse sodalite gemstone under the running water for a couple of minutes and then pat them dry, it is not going to harm your mineral. Sodalite jewelry should not be put in contact with salt water as it can dissolve the stone.

## Why should you not put Sodalite in water?

• Loses its natural shine
• The royal blue colour of stone starts fading
• Release toxic substances like aluminium
• Will dissolve in salt water
• Widens the cracks in stone
• Makes the stone fragile
• Makes sodalite dull
• Damage to the finish, chipping and cracking

There are many minerals that when coming in contact with water, start dissolving or lose their natural properties. While sodalite does not have such adverse reactions with water, they sure do get affected. 

When sodalite comes in contact with water, they release toxic substances which can be dangerous and risky. In case you soak sodalite in water, it may start producing aluminium which is a hazardous element.

Throw the water away, rinse the stone thoroughly and wipe it dry. If you fail to dry it immediately, sodalite will lose its waxy texture. 

When a sodalite stone is put in water, water seeps into the fine cracks of the porous stone itself. These water molecules start widening the cracks. These cracks may not be visible to our naked eyes. But someday if you happen to drop this stone, it might scatter into small pieces.

This will happen because the water molecules have made the stone very soft mineral fragile from the inside. This also changes the shine of the stone as now light will reflect differently from sodalite.

Prolonged contact of sodalite with water can reduce its brightness and the royal blue colour may start fading over time. If the gemstone contains other minerals that are likely to react with water, sodalite might even change in structure and appearance.

If you notice sodalite has been damaged due to exposure to water, you can cut off the damaged part and get the finishing done for the rest of the stone. This may help in getting back the natural colour and finish of the stone.

## How to cleanse and recharge Sodalite

Sodalite crystal, Image source: Wikipedia

If you want to benefit from the positive energy of sodalite, it is important that it is cleansed and recharged frequently. If your sodalite becomes cloudy then it is time to cleanse it.

As sodalite cannot be put in water then how do you cleanse sodalite? There are multiple ways to cleanse and recharge sodalite without causing it any damage. Cleansing in the following ways will restore its true properties. 

## Cleanse Sodalite using sunlight

Sunlight is one of the powerful sources of energy. Like how humans need their daily sunlight dose, crystals can also be recharged using this source. 

You can cleanse sodalite by keeping the stone under direct sunlight. This will help in restoring sodalite properties

Word of caution – Do not keep sodalite in direct sunlight for more than 2 hours. Direct sunlight for a longer period can cause the stone to lose its natural colour. 

## Cleanse Sodalite using moonlight

Moonlight is one of the most effective and safe ways to recharge sodalite. The feminine energy of the moon delicately cleanses the stone. You can place the stone near the window or outside so it’s directly under the moonlight. Let the stone remain like that overnight. Next morning, your stone will be recharged and ready to use.

## Cleanse Sodalite using Amethyst

You can also use amethyst to recharge sodalite. Amethyst ranges around 7 on the moh’s hardness scale and is absolutely safe in the water. Thus, making it easy to recharge. You can place sodalite next to amethyst. This will help sodalite recharge with positive energy and restore its properties. 

## Can Sodalite go in Salt Water

Sodalite being a fragile crystal should not be placed in salt water. Sodalite has a hardness of less than 7 on moh’s hardness scale. This makes it not suitable for water exposure. Similarly, salt water is even more harmful to sodalite. The water and salt molecules widen the cracks in sodalite. This can lead to crystals getting dissolved.

However, salt can be used to cleanse sodalite. Place sodalite crystals in a container. Place this container in a bigger vessel that is filled with dry salt. Now the container with fluorescent sodalite crystals is immersed in a vessel filled with salts. This will ensure submerging sodalite crystals do not come in direct contact with salt but are also getting cleansed with positive energy.

## Can sodalite go in Moon Water

Moon as we know has a very gentle energy that contains a massive superpower. For many crystals, moon water acts as an excellent cleaner. Getting water charged with moonlight is not very easy. Healers generally prefer doing so on a full moon day which doesn’t occur frequently. 

Can sodalite go in this water? No. Sodalite cannot be immersed in moon water. Moon has a very powerful positive energy that cleanses many crystals. However, the composition of moon water remains the same as regular water. This makes it unsuitable for sodalite.

## Can sodalite go in Bath Water

No, sodalite cannot be put in bath water. It is a fragile porous crystal that can crack due to exposure to regular water. Hence, it is recommended to not put the crystal in your bath water. 

Crystals that range higher on moh’s hardness scale are generally used during baths. Many healers use these crystals in the bathroom to create soothing energy. These are also used during the spa to rejuvenate your mind and soul.

However, sodalite should be kept away from the bathing area. Steam and soap or any chemicals found in our bathroom can potentially harm the sodalite crystal. The steam creates a thin layer of water on the crystal which can widen the cracks. Hence it is important you keep your clean sodalite away from the bathroom area.

If wearing sodalite as jewellery, remove it outside the bathroom. Do not take it inside and place it on the slab. This might also harm the crystal.

## Can you drink sodalite infused water

Sodalite is a gemstone that is in the category of fragile crystals or precious stones. Drinking sodalite-infused water can be poisonous. There are other gemstones that can be used for preparing the gem water.

## How to prepare sodalite elixir

Elixir is a drink that is prepared in a way that it absorbs all the crystal healing properties of the gemstone. This, when consumed by individuals, can transfer the energy from gemstones to us. This drink helps in the healing powers to people and is said to be beneficial for health.

As we saw, sodalite cannot be brought in contact with water, a sodalite elixir cannot be prepared. Drinking water that had sodalite immersed in it can be dangerous and toxic. 

However, there is an indirect way to prepare sodalite elixir.

Place sodalite crystals in an empty jar. Immerse this jar in a bigger vessel that is filled with warm soapy water. Make sure water does not seep into the jar with the healing crystals. Now place this vessel under morning sunlight or the moonlight overnight. This way water will be able to absorb positive energy and healing properties of sodalite.

## Factors to evaluate before exposing your crystal to water:

## Hardness of your crystal 

The hardness of anything below 7 on moh’s hardness scale cannot be exposed to water. These crystals are fragile in nature. Water molecules can enter the crystal collection cracks and widen them.

## Mineral composition of your crystal

The crystal should not contain elements that tend to react upon exposure to water. Reaction with water can release the natural properties of the crystal.

## Colour of your crystal

The Colour of the crystal is important before you decide to immerse it in water. Some crystals lose their natural colour and shine and become dull.

Check out what happens when you put other crystals in water:

• Can Moonstone go in water?
• Can Fluorite go in water?
• Can Aventurine go in water?
• Can tiger’s eye go in water?

Want to know more about other crystals? Find out if Aventurine can go in water or not

## Caribbean Calcite Meaning

Caribbean calcite is a very attractive stone with its soft blue hue and calming energy. It is made from three different crystals, white aragonite, brown Aragonite and the ocean blue Calcite. All these three crystals possess their own unique properties. When combined together, they make Caribbean calcite a powerful gemstone.

This gemstone emits very soothing and therapeutic energy. Its connection to the crown chakra and the third eye chakra enhances its healing powers. Caribbean Calcite’s meaning comes from the fact that it is a stone of being carefree.

Caribbean calcite meaning can be summarised as the following: 

• Restoring balance and calmness
• Enhancing positive aura
• Eliminating negative energy
• Provoking deeper thoughts
• Releases stress and anxiety

Caribbean calcite is an oceanic blue-coloured crystal with hints of grey and brown. This crystal has various patterns on it which depict the waves and emit relaxing vibrations. This makes it a one-of-a-kind gemstone that can soothe the aura in just one glance. 

Caribbean calcite has healing characteristics which make you look at your inner self and aids in making corrections. It gives you the ability to get past the traumas and bad experiences of the past. 

This “calming stone” navigates you to a higher level in life where you are more motivated about life and there is a sense of calmness and awareness.

## About Caribbean Calcite & Its Origin

Caribbean calcite is a very recent discovery and was found in 2019 in Pakistan. Its ocean blue colour and physical resemblance to the sea contributed to its name ‘Caribbean Calcite’. While most of the Caribbean calcite is polished, you may also find this crystal having crevices. The Hardness of this gemstone ranges from 3 to 3.5 on Moh’s hardness scale. This makes Caribbean calcite a delicate crystal. 

This gemstone has numerous benefits and healing properties that has been covered in the following sections

## How to cleanse your Caribbean Calcite

When you first bring your Caribbean Calcite home, make sure you cleanse it. Place the stone in a container filled with water and soak it overnight. Take it out of the water the next morning and pat it dry. The crystal has been cleansed from any negative energy that it must have been carrying. 

It is important that you cleanse your crystal frequently so that the impurity can be removed and that it absorbs in the process of healing. For cleansing, you can immerse it in clean water for a minute or two. Do not use fresh water or salty water. This may impact and alter their crystal’s performance. 

You may also place the crystal with other healing gemstones. This will also help in cleansing the crystal.

## How to activate Caribbean Calcite

It is essential that you activate Caribbean Calcite before starting to use them. To activate them, place the stone in the sun for an hour. Make sure the sunlight is not too harsh. You can start using the stone post this activity. The crystal will start emitting positive vibrations that you can benefit from.
